lessonPlan.theme: Listening to the bow, tempo control from slow to fast

segment.name: Warmup and mobility
segment.focus: hips, shoulders, wrists, ankle prep for au
segment.note: watch right shoulder load, keep it gentle

segment.name: Technique build
segment.drill: esquiva to au, meia lua de frente, partner spacing

segment.name: Music literacy
segment.focus: call and response, the chorus, clapping on time

segment.name: Roda
segment.focus: controlled fast game, enter and exit with respect

segment.name: Closing
segment.focus: cool down song, announcements for belt season
